subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are servants whose hearts have been set ablaze by the fire of Thy love, and whose cord of patience hath been severed through their separation from Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد توقدت افئدتهم بنار محبتک و انصرم حبل اصطبارهم لهجرانهم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
